steps.name: post-publish-verification-jobs
steps.summary: Added the post-publish verification job contract for public URL and Markdown content hash checks, published-only crawler output manifests for sitemap/feed/llms surfaces, retryable feed/llms/IndexNow/Discord jobs, and state decisions for required vs retryable failures.

steps.name: crawler-output-generation
steps.summary: Added published-only crawler output rendering and route handlers for sitemap.xml, feed.xml, llms.txt, and llms-full.txt. Outputs reuse the post-publish manifest, validate current version content_hash, avoid preview/failed posts, and do not expose source snapshots or internal evidence paths.

steps.name: indexnow-discord-retryable-jobs
steps.summary: Added adapter-backed retryable IndexNow and Discord job execution contract. External side effects are disabled by default, deterministic idempotency keys are enforced before adapter calls, failures keep published posts public, retry_count/error are recorded, and retry-limit exhaustion returns an operator alert instead of retrying forever.
